name: design_phase_check
summary: Simulated user moves into design and shapes creative direction before sequencing.

displayTruth.goal: Shape the creative direction for the current song before any sequence implementation begins.
displayTruth.creativeIntent: Warm, nostalgic, and emotionally grounded, with a gentle build and selective moments of lift rather than constant energy.
designPriorities: contrast between intimate and lifted sections
keep the overall show cohesive with the project mission
displayTruth.boundary: Do not jump into xLights implementation until the design direction feels solid.
